name: Cyber Confession Room
short_description: When you confide in your heart, 'I' will accompany you on the journey of redemption. Cyber Confession Room "is an interactive visual novel game where you can choose a tree hole to listen to your confession. You can also practice public welfare tasks to obtain redemption
detailed_description:
Speak it out, and 'I' will assist you in finding redemption.

Cyber Confessional is an innovative game that integrates public - welfare practice, spiritual outpouring, and plot exploration, pursuing inner salvation in a virtual world. The hustle and bustle and pressure of modern society have dusted people’s hearts. Players step into the “Cyber Confessional” and can embark on a unique journey.

Cyber Confessional is now available!!!

Real-World Charity Missions

Complete 81 real-world charity tasks to gradually resolve past regrets through acts of kindness.

Find redemption in encouragement and heartfelt praise.

Treehole Mode

A judgment-free zone for unfiltered self-expression—your secrets stay safely encrypted.

Easter Egg Storylines

Unlock hidden storylines influenced by your choices, packed with surprises and emotional depth.
